evaluators.name: Bookmark Affordable European AI Conference (Late 2025)
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user bookmarked at least one international AI-related conference in Europe between September and December 2025 that offers a student registration option under 250 in its registration currency.

evaluators.name: One-Day Multi-Track Climate Schedule Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added at least three climate-related sessions between 09:00 and 17:00, all on the same conference day and spanning at least two different tracks, to their personal schedule.

evaluators.name: Follow Canadian ML-for-Healthcare Researcher Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user followed at least one researcher based in Canada whose expertise includes machine learning for healthcare and whose h-index is between 30 and 60.

evaluators.name: Save Three Most Recent Open-Access Renewable Energy Policy Papers
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added to their reading list the three most recent open-access publications on renewable energy policy from 2021–2024 in journals with impact factor > 5.

evaluators.name: Pre-Register for Affordable Half-Day Data Visualization Workshop
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user pre-registered as a guest for a half-day data visualization workshop costing under 150, selecting the morning time slot when multiple sessions are available and avoiding immediate online payment.

evaluators.name: Subscribe to Weekly AI Ethics and Climate Policy Newsletters in HTML
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user used a single email address to subscribe to weekly AI ethics and climate policy newsletters in HTML format.

evaluators.name: One-Time Anonymous $75 Early-Career Grants Donation Draft
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a one-time 75 USD donation draft to the Early Career Research Grants program, marked as anonymous and opted out of physical mail, stopping before payment completion.

evaluators.name: Choose Most Economical Eligible Membership Plan
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user started a membership application for the cheaper of the student and professional plans that both include member-only webinars and discounted conference fees.
